# o2-scalpel-prolog

Scalpel refactor MCP server for Prolog (SWI-Prolog) via swipl

## Install

```bash
claude plugin install o2-scalpel-prolog --from o2-scalpel
```

## Requirements

- Claude Code >= 1.0.0
- LSP server: `swipl` on `$PATH`
- File extensions handled: .pl, .pro, .prolog

## Facades

| Facade | Summary |
|---|---|
| `scalpel_fix_lints` | Apply diagnostic quick-fixes (singleton variables, syntax errors) |
| `scalpel_rename_predicate` | Rename a Prolog predicate or variable across the current file |

## Skills

This plugin ships skills under `skills/` so Claude knows when to call each facade.
